2012-T3-P3-S3.trunk: 四个并列分句（分号 + and）：researchers make discoveries; editors … act as gatekeepers; other scientists use …; the public … receives …
structure: 状语：Within the complex social structure of the scientific community
并列分句②(;)：editors and reviewers act as gatekeepers by controlling the publication process
并列分句③(;)：other scientists use the new finding to suit their own purposes
并列分句④(; and finally)：the public (including other scientists) receives the new discovery and possibly accompanying technology
2012-T3-P3-S3.logic: 四个由分号和 and 并列的分句，描绘科学共同体的运作链条；by controlling… 方式状语；to suit… 目的状语。
notes: 四个分句由分号与 and 并列（make / act / use / receives）。
act as 充当；by controlling… 方式状语（通过…）；to suit… 目的状语。
accompanying technology：现在分词作定语（随附的技术）。

2012-T3-P1-S1.trunk: S+V：facts about the world are waiting to be observed and collected（关于世界的事实正等待被观察和收集）
structure: 状语：In the idealized version of how science is done
└ 介词宾语从句(how，作 of 的宾语)：how science is done
主句：facts about the world are waiting to be observed and collected by objective researchers
├ 不定式被动并列：to be observed and collected
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 researchers〕：who use the scientific method to carry out their work
└ 不定式作目的状语：to carry out their work
2012-T3-P1-S1.logic: how science is done 是介词 of 的宾语从句；主句 facts are waiting to be observed and collected（不定式被动）；who 定语从句修饰 researchers；to carry out 表目的。
notes: how science is done 是介词 of 的宾语从句（科学如何进行）。
are waiting to be observed and collected：不定式被动并列（等待被观察和收集）。
who 定语从句修饰 researchers；to carry out their work 目的状语。

2012-T3-P3-S4.trunk: S+V+O：the interaction and confrontation … transforms an individual's discovery claim into the community's credible discovery（互动与交锋把个人的发现主张转化为共同体公认的发现）
structure: 时间状语从句(As)：As a discovery claim works its way through the community
主句：the interaction and confrontation … transforms an individual's discovery claim into the community's credible discovery
├ 介词短语作定语〔修饰 interaction and confrontation〕：between shared and competing beliefs about the science and the technology involved
└ 过去分词作后置定语〔修饰 technology〕：involved
2012-T3-P3-S4.logic: As 引导时间状语从句（随着…）；主句主语 the interaction and confrontation 后接 between… 长定语（造成主谓分隔），谓语 transforms A into B；involved 后置定语修饰 technology。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 the interaction and confrontation 与谓语 transforms 被 between… 长介词短语隔开（视为一个整体概念，故谓语用单数 transforms）。
As 引导时间状语从句（随着一项发现主张在共同体中逐步推进）。
transform A into B 把 A 转变为 B；the technology involved：involved 后置定语（所涉及的技术）。
